quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Cfn:
A waterfall chart.

For more information, see [Using waterfall charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/waterfall-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Act.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Cha.Description: The configuration for a waterfall visual.

quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Col.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Sub.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Tit.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.waterfallvisual.Vis.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
